app.name: Adolescent Physical Fitness
app.tagline: Physical fitness assessment in Secondary Education

landing.heroTitle: Measure, assess and improve your students' physical fitness
landing.heroSubtitle: Educational platform for Physical Education teachers in Secondary School. Eurofit and CFS batteries with official scales, Omni-Res perceived exertion, PDF reports and comparative analytics.
landing.feature1Desc: Eurofit and CFS with 6 tests each. Scores computed automatically by age and sex.
landing.feature2Desc: Two-step verification by email code — no extra apps, accessible to every teacher.
landing.feature3Desc: Each student can check their own results with a personal code — no account needed.
landing.feature4Desc: Compare your school and group with aggregated results from the whole community.

auth.title: Teacher login
auth.otpDesc: We sent a 6-digit code to your email. Enter it to complete sign in.
auth.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm your account, then sign in.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.weakPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters.

studentLogin.title: Student access
studentLogin.subtitle: Enter your personal code to see your results
studentLogin.notFound: No student found with that code.

centros.title: Schools
centros.subtitle: Pick an existing school or register a new one
centros.name: School name

grupos.title: Class groups
grupos.noGrupos: No groups yet. Create your first one to start.
